scenario: R1 max_age dead-code removal regression (bulk, behavior-neutral)
notes: windows-mcp available; GUI on default Chrome. copilot.microsoft.com loaded in guest mode (no login wall). Pasted PII prompt via clipboard, submitted. Copilot answered NORMALLY ('개인정보(예: 주민등록번호)는 안전을 위해 공유하지 않는 것이 좋아요...') with NO 보안 정책 block. Microsoft-domain MITM bypass (infra, not engine): copilot.microsoft.com presents a real Microsoft Azure cert so the MITM bridge cannot see its traffic and the engine never intercepts.
